# Data and Code Availability Template

## Data Availability

De-identified derived data supporting the findings of this study are available
at **[repository name]**, accession **[accession]**, URL **[URL]**. Raw bulk
RNA-seq data are available at **[repository/accession]**. Raw single-cell RNA-seq
data are available at **[repository/accession]**. Clinical and imaging data that
cannot be made fully public because of participant privacy or institutional
restrictions may be requested through **[access procedure/contact]**, subject to
ethics approval and a data-use agreement.

## Code Availability

The analysis code, configuration files, environment specification, and
machine-readable workflow manifest used for the revised analyses are available
at **[repository URL]**, release **[version/tag]**, commit **[commit hash]**.

## Required Verification

- Replace every bracketed placeholder.
- Confirm that repository links are public or that controlled-access procedures work.
- Ensure the release matches the exact code used for revised figures and tables.
- Do not claim raw-data availability until deposition is complete.
